testcase.name: test_move_deal_to_first_look
testcase.error: backend/tests/test_contacts_system.py:46: in test_deal_id assert resp.status_code in [200, 201], f"Failed to create deal: {resp.text}" E AssertionError: Failed to create deal: {"detail":"Method Not Allowed"} E assert 405 in [200, 201] E + where 405 = <Response [405]>.status_code

testcase.name: test_move_deal_to_in_conversation
testcase.error: backend/tests/test_contacts_system.py:46: in test_deal_id assert resp.status_code in [200, 201], f"Failed to create deal: {resp.text}" E AssertionError: Failed to create deal: {"detail":"Method Not Allowed"} E assert 405 in [200, 201] E + where 405 = <Response [405]>.status_code

testcase.name: test_no_downgrade_on_move_back
testcase.error: backend/tests/test_contacts_system.py:46: in test_deal_id assert resp.status_code in [200, 201], f"Failed to create deal: {resp.text}" E AssertionError: Failed to create deal: {"detail":"Method Not Allowed"} E assert 405 in [200, 201] E + where 405 = <Response [405]>.status_code

testcase.name: test_contacts_have_required_fields

failure.message: AssertionError: assert ('founder_name' in {'company': 'Test Company', 'contact_status': 'In Pipeline', 'created_at': '2026-04-19T05:50:01.426808+00:00', 'deal_count': 1, ...} or 'company_name' in {'company': 'Test Company', 'contact_status': 'In Pipeline', 'created_at': '2026-04-19T05:50:01.426808+00:00', 'deal_count': 1, ...})

testcase.failure: backend/tests/test_contacts_system.py:140: in test_contacts_have_required_fields assert 'founder_name' in c or 'company_name' in c E AssertionError: assert ('founder_name' in {'company': 'Test Company', 'contact_status': 'In Pipeline', 'created_at': '2026-04-19T05:50:01.426808+00:00', 'deal_count': 1, ...} or 'company_name' in {'company': 'Test Company', 'contact_status': 'In Pipeline', 'created_at': '2026-04-19T05:50:01.426808+00:00', 'deal_count': 1, ...})

testcase.name: test_contact_status_values_are_valid

failure.message: AssertionError: Invalid status: In Pipeline assert 'In Pipeline' in {'Closed', 'Due Diligence', 'First Look', 'In Conversation', 'Passed', 'Watch List'}

testcase.failure: backend/tests/test_contacts_system.py:149: in test_contact_status_values_are_valid assert status in valid_statuses, f"Invalid status: {status}" E AssertionError: Invalid status: In Pipeline E assert 'In Pipeline' in {'Closed', 'Due Diligence', 'First Look', 'In Conversation', 'Passed', 'Watch List'}
